description: Product description Get ready to turn heads and bring laughter wherever you dress up hilarious green inflatable costume for adults! Perfect for Halloween, Christmas parties, or any festive occasion, this blow up costume is sure to be the life of the party. Imagine the looks on everyone's faces as you waddle around, bouncing off walls and furniture in your inflatable glory. Made from durable polyester materials, this costume is designed to withstand the elements and keep you comfortable while you entertain the masses. Simply blow up costume! With its vibrant green color and whimsical design, this inflatable costume is a must-have for anyone looking to add a touch of humor and excitement to their next event. Don't miss out on the opportunity to be the center of attention and create unforgettable memories with this hilarious blow-up costume. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 14 years. For use only under adult supervision.
